page.noServicesText: This provider has not set up their services yet.

flow.title: Build your appointment
flow.subtitle: Add one or more services.
flow.continueWithCart: Continue · {count, plural, one {# service} other {# services}} · {total}

demo.confirmedText: This is exactly what your clients will see after booking with you.
demo.trialNote: {days} days free, no credit card required

slot.title: Choose a date and time
slot.noAvailabilityHint: within the next {days} days. Please check back later or contact the professional directly.
slot.almostFullBadge: Almost full · {count, plural, one {# slot} other {# slots}}
slot.dayFull: Fully booked that day for this service.

slotPicker.emptyText: No slots available for the selected period.

confirm.title: Your details
confirm.nameError: Name must be at least 2 characters
confirm.pendingInfo: Your booking will be pending until the provider confirms it. You will receive an email as soon as it is confirmed.
confirm.terms: By confirming, you agree to our terms and conditions and our privacy policy.

clientForm.terms: By confirming, you agree to our <cgv>terms and conditions</cgv> and our <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.

choicesPicker.noChoices: No variations, options or info — clients will see the base price directly.

serviceList.emptyText: No services available at the moment.

appCta.title: Download the Opatam app
appCta.subtitle: Keep track of your appointments, get reminders and book in one tap.

proCta.title: Are you a professional too?
proCta.subtitle: Create your booking page in 5 minutes and welcome your first clients today.
proCta.subtitleOnline: Create your online booking page in 5 minutes and welcome your first clients today.

confirmation.pendingPaymentText: Your payment has just been made and is being verified. This page will update in a few seconds.
confirmation.pendingText: Your booking request has been sent. You will receive an email as soon as the provider confirms it.
confirmation.depositPaidText: Your booking is confirmed and your {amount} deposit has been received. A confirmation email has been sent to you.
confirmation.confirmedText: Your booking has been recorded. A confirmation email has been sent to you.
confirmation.addressRevealLater: Exact address shared ~48h before the appointment.
confirmation.emailSentTo: A confirmation email has been sent to <email>{address}</email>

cancel.notFoundText: This cancellation link is no longer valid. The appointment may have already been cancelled or the link has expired.
cancel.alreadyCancelledText: This appointment has already been cancelled.
cancel.pastText: This appointment has already taken place and can no longer be cancelled.
cancel.refunded: Your {amount} deposit has been refunded to your payment method. Please allow 5 to 10 business days for it to appear.
cancel.refundDeadlinePassed: The deposit refund deadline has passed. For any request, please contact {name} directly.
cancel.providerNotified: The provider has been notified of this cancellation.
cancel.formSubtitle: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?
cancel.reasonPlaceholder: E.g. unexpected event, change of plans...
cancel.refundEligible: Your {amount} deposit will be refunded automatically.
cancel.refundNotEligible: The refund deadline has passed. Your {amount} deposit will not be refunded automatically. Please contact {name} for any request.
cancel.warning: This action cannot be undone. The provider will be notified of your cancellation.

review.notFoundText: This booking does not exist or the link is invalid.
review.notYetPassedText: You will be able to leave a review after your appointment.
review.alreadyReviewedText: You have already left a review for this appointment.
review.savedText: Your review has been saved and will be visible on the provider's page.
review.updateFormSubtitle: You have already left a review for {name}. You can edit it below.

success.emailSent: A confirmation email has just been sent to you.
success.appTitle: Manage your appointment in the Opatam app
success.appSubtitle: Automatic reminders, changes and new bookings in one tap.
